AppDescription.message: Uklanja crne trake sa video sadržaja na ultraširokim ekranima (21:9, 32:9, itd) svugde, uključujući YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video, itd.

ImproveUs.message: Molimo recite nam kako da se poboljšamo preko email-a

Off.description: Name of the mode when the extension is disabled and doesn't apply any transformations

PrivacyPolicyText.message: Cenimo vašu privatnost i poštujemo EU GDPR. Molimo pregledajte i prihvatite našu politiku privatnosti da biste počeli da koristite UltraWide Video.

ReviewUs.message: Molimo ostavite recenziju za UltraWide Video na Chrome Web Store-u

Stretch.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets stretched horizontally to fill the video element and remove black bars

Zoom.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets zoomed (scaled up, vertically and horizontally) to fill the video element and remove black bars
